title: Big Tires
description: Adds a lot of pretty huge tires and additional physical properties for them for Create Off-road
body:
## General ![tires](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eb58264e796beca3abf76fb54b3ec8916649354_0.webp) ### This mod adds a lot of tires: - (10x10x3) huge tire - (10x10x4) huge wide tire


- (12x12x4) huge rowing tire (can row, floats) - (12x12x6) huge rowing wide tire (can row, floats)


- (3x3x1) big tractor tire - (2x2x1) tractor tire


- (3x3x1.5) truck tire - (3х3х1) narrow truck tire - (2x2x1) small truck tire


- (5x5x3.5) Monster Jam Tires (Texture By Fly-By-Wire)


- (4x4x1.5) Bamboo Wheels (can row,float)


- (3x3x1) Vintage Tire


- (4x4x0.2) Wooden Wheel


- (2x2x1) Drift Tire


### Also Wheel Wrench! You can flip your wheels so V thread wheels will look properly ![Wrench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/281d6592c51b68cca751ac2b1ec2e57c59ac8258.png) ![works](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba7114d59d98655572d6ebe24b6c2da9315a5498_0.webp) ## Showcase ### Builds ![swim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7439b8e85ad6705456c721c79dae49842dec3cf9_0.webp) ### Crafts ![Bigrtc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8f3182245ac2c9e02c01f525c47b2689caa423f.png)![Bamboocre](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6ff2c6a5f4c94185ff7bdf0b83625d977336803.png)![traccraf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baf4df15c483c10ba70b653bf9d37a84d7b23fc4.png) ## Work in Progress: - textures for all tires - chains for tires (stops tires from slipping) - make it dyable (at least ones from the mod) - motorcycle and fixed wheelmount - more is coming... ## Credits: **Textures:** C1 (1of_the_cee_one), Fly-By-Wire (giantalexis), me. **Code and Models:** me.
